description: Canonical FreeDesignStore design asset playbooks. MCP exposes these through list_design_skills, get_design_skill, and apply_design_skill.

skills.title: Asset Brief Builder
skills.summary: Turn a vague visual request into a concrete asset brief before creating or uploading.

skills.title: SVG Illustration Director
skills.summary: Create safe, useful SVG illustrations that are ready for FDS catalog submission.

skills.title: Icon Set Designer
skills.summary: Design coherent icon assets with consistent grid, stroke, naming, and export rules.

skills.title: Stock Photo Curator
skills.summary: Choose whether a photo should be FDS-hosted, uploaded by a rights holder, or linked off to Unsplash.

skills.title: License Safety Reviewer
skills.summary: Check rights, attribution, unsafe SVG markup, privacy, trademarks, and Unsplash handling before publication.

skills.title: Publish Ready Asset Reviewer
skills.summary: Decide whether a pending design asset is ready to publish, needs revision, or should be rejected.
